title: Color coding Workspace favorites
excerpt: A feature I’d love to see is being able to color code folders that are in the favorites workspace, like you can within a regular workspace. It would be much easier to navigate that column.

posts.author: kvana (Kathryn Van Aernum)
posts.cookedHtml: A feature I’d love to see is being able to color code folders that are in the favorites workspace, like you can within a regular workspace. It would be much easier to navigate that column.
